OPPOSITION TO RESPONDENT ONE RINCON DEVELOPMENT, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARIBTRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER OSBORNE, TOD
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER TOD OSBORNE'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. ACCEPTING THE ARBITRATOR'S LEGAL THEORY RINCON WAS NOT PREJUDICED BY EXCLUSION OF TESTIMONY OF VALUE IN 2009 ESPECIALLY IN LIGHT OF THE ADMISSION OF OTHER EVIDENCE CONCERNING A DECLINE IN VALUE AFTER JUNE 2008 AND THE ARBITRATORS DECISION AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT JUNE 2008 WAS THE APPROPRIATE MEASURING POINT. MR. ROWLETT TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
